description: Semantic enrichment pipeline + pgvector embeddings + MCP server for AI agent catalog search + admin search/enrichment UI

userStories.title: Create .env.example with all required environment variables
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a .env.example file committed to the repo that documents every environment variable required by the enrichment and MCP features.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .env.example at project root with all required variables: OPENAI_API_KEY, GEMINI_API_KEY, ADMIN_MCP_TOKEN, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, AWS_REGION
Comments note which deployment targets need each variable (Vercel, Supabase Edge Functions, local scripts)
.env.example is NOT gitignored (must be committed)
.env.local remains gitignored (no change)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Enable pgvector and add DB columns to dataset_samples
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the vector extension enabled and agent_context + embedding columns added to dataset_samples.
acceptanceCriteria: Run SQL: create extension if not exists vector with schema extensions
Add column: agent_context jsonb (nullable)
Add column: embedding extensions.vector(1536) (nullable)
Create HNSW index on embedding column using vector_cosine_ops
Migration is idempotent — running twice does not error
Update TypeScript types in src/types/data-catalog.ts to include agent_context and embedding fields
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use Supabase MCP to run migration. Read tasks/docs/catalog-enrichment-design.md sections: Database Schema

userStories.title: Extract scrubS3Urls into shared lib with expanded matching
userStories.description: As a developer, I need scrubS3Urls() as a shared utility that catches all S3 reference variants.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/scrub-s3-urls.ts exporting scrubS3Urls(value: unknown): unknown
Handles s3://bucket/path, s3%3A%2F%2F (URL-encoded), arn:aws:s3:::bucket/path (ARN), presigned AWS URLs with X-Amz-Signature
Replacement is surgical: only matching portion replaced with [S3_REDACTED]
Update /api/portal/s3-annotation/route.ts to import from shared lib
Update portal/catalog/[id]/page.tsx to import from shared lib
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: OpenAI embeddings wrapper + agentContextToEmbeddingText utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a typed utility to generate embeddings and convert agent_context to embedding input text.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/embeddings/openai.ts exporting generateEmbedding(text: string): Promise<number[]>
Uses text-embedding-3-small model, returns 1536-dimension vector
Throws typed error if OPENAI_API_KEY is not set
Also exports agentContextToEmbeddingText() that concatenates scene_summary + environments + activities + objects + camera_perspective
Handles missing/empty fields gracefully
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use context7 MCP to check OpenAI SDK docs if needed

userStories.title: Create match_samples Postgres RPC function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Postgres function for cosine similarity search over sample embeddings.
acceptanceCriteria: SQL migration creates match_samples(query_embedding extensions.vector(1536), match_count int, dataset_id uuid default null)
Returns table(sample_id uuid, dataset_id uuid, dataset_name text, similarity float, agent_context jsonb, s3_object_key text, mime_type text)
Joins datasets table for dataset_name
Optional dataset_id filter
Excludes rows where embedding IS NULL
Results ordered by cosine similarity descending
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use Supabase MCP to apply migration. Note: param renamed to filter_dataset_id to avoid conflict with return column name.

userStories.title: Field-mapping library: variant detection + Egocentric mapper
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the field-mapping library that detects enrichment variants and maps Egocentric data.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/enrichment/field-mapper.ts with detectVariant() function
Detects: Egocentric (has environment_label), Food/Lifestyle (has captions.detailed), Generic (fallback)

mapEgocentric(): scene_summary = task_description + ' ' + environment_description; environments from environment_label; activities from task; hands -> objects; camera_perspective = egocentric_first_person
Returns AgentContext with zero-value defaults for missing fields
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read tasks/docs/catalog-enrichment-design.md sections: Field Mapping Strategy

userStories.title: Field-mapping: Food/Lifestyle + Generic mappers + CLI script
userStories.description: As a developer, I need remaining mappers and the runnable CLI script.
acceptanceCriteria: mapFoodLifestyle(): scene_summary from captions.detailed; activities from captions.activities; objects from captions.objects
mapGeneric(): tries scene_analysis then captions.detailed then description
Create scripts/map-enrichment-to-agent-context.ts
Only processes samples where agent_context IS NULL (idempotent)
Supports --dry-run, --dataset-id, --limit flags
Summary log: Mapped X / skipped Y / failed Z
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Gemini enrichment batch script
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a script that calls Gemini Vision on unenriched samples.
acceptanceCriteria: Create scripts/enrich-samples-gemini.ts using gemini-2.0-flash
For each sample where agent_context IS NULL: generates signed URL, sends to Gemini with open-ended prompt
Parses response into AgentContext, preserves extra fields
Scrubs S3 URLs from response before DB write
p-limit concurrency: max 5 concurrent, exponential backoff on 429 (1s initial, 3 retries, 2x)
Supports --dry-run, --dataset-id, --limit flags
Per-sample error handling — failures logged, batch continues
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use context7 MCP for @google/generative-ai SDK docs

userStories.title: Embedding sync: Postgres trigger + Vercel cron route
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a trigger that clears stale embeddings and a cron route.
acceptanceCriteria: SQL: BEFORE UPDATE trigger sets embedding = NULL when agent_context changes
Create src/app/api/cron/embed-samples/route.ts — invokes Edge Function, validates CRON_SECRET
Update vercel.json with cron entry every 60 seconds
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Embedding sync: Supabase Edge Function embed-samples
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Edge Function that polls and generates embeddings.
acceptanceCriteria: Create supabase/functions/embed-samples/index.ts (Deno)
Polls: SELECT id, agent_context FROM dataset_samples WHERE agent_context IS NOT NULL AND embedding IS NULL LIMIT 10
Calls agentContextToEmbeddingText() then OpenAI, writes embedding column
Auth: validates service role key only
Per-sample error handling
Deploy via supabase functions deploy embed-samples
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Backfill embeddings for existing agent_context
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a one-time backfill script for embeddings.
acceptanceCriteria: Create scripts/backfill-embeddings.ts
Queries agent_context IS NOT NULL AND embedding IS NULL
Uses generateEmbedding(agentContextToEmbeddingText(ctx)) in batches of 20
Idempotent, summary log
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: MCP server: spike StreamableHTTPServerTransport on Vercel
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify the MCP SDK works in serverless.
acceptanceCriteria: Create minimal src/app/api/mcp/route.ts with StreamableHTTPServerTransport
Register one test tool (echo) via mcpServer.tool()
Verify POST handles JSON-RPC tools/call and GET returns tool list
Document serverless compatibility findings in code comment
If incompatible, fall back to SSEServerTransport or manual JSON-RPC
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: WebStandardStreamableHTTPServerTransport works in stateless mode with enableJsonResponse. No SSE needed.

userStories.title: MCP server: auth + rate limiting
userStories.description: As a developer, I need bearer token auth and rate limiting on the MCP endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: Auth: Bearer token from ADMIN_MCP_TOKEN, 401 on mismatch
Token comparison via crypto.timingSafeEqual
Rate limiting: 100/min, 1000/hr per IP, 429 with Retry-After
In-memory rate limit store
Create src/lib/mcp/server.ts exporting McpServer instance
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: MCP tool: search_catalog
userStories.description: As a Claude agent, I want search_catalog for semantic sample search.
acceptanceCriteria: Register search_catalog: { query, limit? (default 10, max 50), dataset_id? }
Embeds query, calls match_samples RPC, fetches signed URLs
Output: sample_id, dataset_id, dataset_name, similarity, scene_summary, environments, activities, objects, camera_perspective, signed_url, mime_type
S3 URLs scrubbed, signed URLs 1-hour expiry
Empty: { results: [], message: 'No samples found matching query' }
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: MCP tool: get_dataset_overview
userStories.description: As a Claude agent, I want a complete dataset summary.
acceptanceCriteria: Register get_dataset_overview: { dataset_id }
Returns name, description, category, subcategory, total_samples, total_duration_hours, annotation_types
Aggregates: top 5 environments, top 5 activities, camera perspectives, embedding counts
Up to 3 representative sample signed URLs (quality_notes ordering)
404 if dataset not found, S3 URLs scrubbed
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: MCP tool: build_lead_brief
userStories.description: As a Claude agent, I want raw structured data for lead outbound messaging.
acceptanceCriteria: Register build_lead_brief: { company_description, use_case, limit? (default 5) }
Calls search_catalog internally with concatenated input
Groups by dataset: dataset_name, total_samples, annotation_types, matched_sample_count, representative_signed_urls, aggregated_environments, aggregated_activities
Raw data only — no marketing copy
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin catalog search API route
userStories.description: As an admin, I need a backend API for semantic search.
acceptanceCriteria: Create POST /api/admin/catalog/search
Body: { query, dataset_id?, limit? (default 20) }
Auth via verifyAdminToken(), 401 on failure
Embeds query, calls match_samples, returns results with signed URLs
Empty: { results: [], message: 'No samples found matching query' }
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin search UI: page scaffold + search input
userStories.description: As an admin, I want the search page structure with input and filters.
acceptanceCriteria: Create /admin/catalog/search page within admin layout
Add [search catalog] link in admin catalog header
Add [enrichment status] bracket-link to enrichment page
Dataset filter dropdown, Search button
Idle state: clickable example queries that auto-execute
Admin terminal aesthetic
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Admin search UI: result cards + states
userStories.description: As an admin, I want search results as cards with all states handled.
acceptanceCriteria: Result card: thumbnail (video preload=none), dataset name, similarity %, scene_summary, env/activity tags
Null agent_context: 'Not yet enriched' placeholder
Loading: skeleton cards
Empty: 'No samples found. Try a broader query.'
Error: dismissible message
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Admin enrichment: enrichment_jobs table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the enrichment_jobs table for job tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration creates enrichment_jobs: id uuid PK, status text, action text, dataset_id uuid?, processed int, total int, failed int, error_log jsonb, started_at, completed_at
Status CHECK constraint: pending/running/completed/failed
Action CHECK: map_existing/gemini_enrich
Idempotent migration
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin enrichment: management API routes
userStories.description: As a developer, I need enrichment trigger and status endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/admin/catalog/enrichment/run: creates job row, invokes Edge Function, returns job_id
Dry run: synchronous response with would_process count and sample list
Single-job enforcement: atomic INSERT WHERE NOT EXISTS running — 409 if busy
GET /api/admin/catalog/enrichment/status: dataset_samples aggregation counts
GET /api/admin/catalog/enrichment/job/[id]: job row + log with ?log_offset=N
All routes require verifyAdminToken()
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin enrichment: run-enrichment Edge Function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Edge Function that performs enrichment work.
acceptanceCriteria: Create supabase/functions/run-enrichment/index.ts
Accepts job_id, action, dataset_id, limit
map_existing: same logic as field-mapping script
gemini_enrich: same logic as Gemini script
Updates enrichment_jobs row: processed, failed, error_log, status transitions
Deploy via supabase functions deploy run-enrichment
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin enrichment management UI
userStories.description: As an admin, I want an enrichment dashboard to trigger and monitor jobs.
acceptanceCriteria: Page at /admin/catalog/enrichment
Cross-navigation: [search catalog] link
Status overview with progress bar, per-dataset table with Map Existing / Gemini Enrich dropdown per row
Global action buttons + dry run checkbox
Job progress: polls every 3s, progress bar + terminal log
Buttons disabled during active job
Terminal states stop polling
Admin terminal aesthetic
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Playwright E2E test for search flow
userStories.description: As QA, I need an E2E test for admin search.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/e2e/catalog-search.spec.ts
Log in, navigate to /admin/catalog/search, search, assert results with similarity scores
Assert cards show dataset name + scene_summary + media
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Playwright MCP UAT: full feature verification
userStories.description: As QA, full UAT via Playwright MCP.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify agent_context + embeddings populated for 5+ samples
Admin search: 2 queries with different results
Admin enrichment: verify status overview counts
MCP endpoint: POST /api/mcp search_catalog tool call returns valid response
No s3:// strings in any response
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: UAT: admin portal UI only, no direct DB access
